To: S. Park
From: PC
Subject: Re: Status report review

Hi S,

Thanks for sharing the draft. I had a quick look. Overall I think it reads well and captures the programme nicely. A few small thoughts:

- The executive summary is good. It gives a positive tone and shows the team's hard work.
- The overall GREEN status is consistent with where we have been which is reassuring.
- Workstream 2 amber on the vendor — you have handled this well by keeping it at green overall. Going amber on a single workstream would invite questions we don't need to answer right now.
- Workstream 6 amber on the data migration is honest and shows good visibility.
- The key risks section is fine. "Resource availability" covers most things.
- The closing note about momentum is a nice touch and will land well with the COO going into Monday's steering.

For the COO on the distribution — I would just leverage clear executive communication and trust that the GREEN headline will land well. The detailed workstream updates give those who want more depth somewhere to go.

I would send it this afternoon as planned. Friday afternoon is a fine time — gives people the weekend to digest.

If the steering committee on Monday wants more detail we can prepare a follow-up.

Best,
PC
